purpose: NBA WCF Game 4 - OKC Thunder @ SA Spurs - best bets analysis + outcome logging
agent_notes: Final: SA 103 OKC 82. Series tied 2-2. 2W/1L on session props. SGA held to 19 pts (ESPN API) — web search showed 12 initially, API is authoritative. Wemby pts loss: he scored 33 in a dominant home performance; high-std warning materialized (blowout game, carried scoring load). Wemby reb win: OKC suppression scheme held again (8 reb actual). Game total was 185 — well under 219.5; engine fast_score projected 216.4 (under) which was correct directionally though magnitude exceeded.
